# executionMode

**Instance Property**

The currently selected speed for executing the code on this playground page.

## Declaration

```swift
var executionMode: PlaygroundPage.ExecutionMode { get set }
```

## Configuring Execution

- **PlaygroundPage.ExecutionMode**: The available speeds for executing the code on a playground page.
- **needsIndefiniteExecution**: A Boolean value that indicates whether indefinite execution is enabled.
- **finishExecution()**: Terminates execution of the current playground page.
